source_section.title_label_raw: Design Requirements for the Young Avenue Sub- Area A (YA-A) Design Requirements Applicable to the Young Avenue Sub-Area A (YA-A)

sections.title_label_raw: Requirements for the Young Avenue Sub- Area A (YA-A) Design Requirements Applicable to the Young Avenue Sub-Area A (YA-A)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements for the Young Avenue Sub- Area A (YA-A) Design Requirements Applicable to the Young Avenue Sub-Area A (YA-A)
provisions.text: A two-unit dwelling use, a three-unit dwelling use, a four-unit dwelling use, or a multi-unit dwelling use that contains up to 5 units within the Young Avenue Sub-Area A (YA-A), as shown on Schedule 3C, shall meet the applicable design requirements of this Chapter. (RC- May23/24;E-Jun 13/24) Design Requirement: Distinct Architectural Design

sections.title_label_raw: Any new main building shall have an architectural design that

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any new main building shall have an architectural design that
provisions.text: Any new main building shall have an architectural design that incorporates distinct articulation, materials, and façade designs to clearly differentiate it from any other dwelling that has frontage on Young Avenue and is located within 100 metres from the subject property. Design Requirement: Pedestrian Entrance Along Young Avenue

sections.title_label_raw: Any new main building shall be required to have:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any new main building shall be required to have:
provisions.text: Any new main building shall be required to have:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any new main building shall be required to have:
provisions.text: a minimum of one pedestrian entrance that faces Young Avenue; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any new main building shall be required to have:
provisions.text: no more than one pedestrian entrance that faces Young Avenue.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any new main building shall be required to have:
provisions.text: The pedestrian entrance that faces Young Avenue shall be required to have an unenclosed porch or a canopy. Design Requirement: Entrance for Underground Parking

sections.title_label_raw: If an underground parking structure is provided, it shall:

provisions.heading_context_raw: If an underground parking structure is provided, it shall:
provisions.text: If an underground parking structure is provided, it shall:

provisions.heading_context_raw: If an underground parking structure is provided, it shall:
If an underground parking structure is provided, it shall:
provisions.text: the garage door shall be located facing the rear yard. Design Requirements
